Amazon Account Specialist - Day Shift, Remote (PH)

RemoteFull time

Philippines

Details

Clear
*Are you a Filipino citizen currently residing in the Philippines and able to work as an independent contractor?
*This role requires working with AEST timezone (7am - 4pm PHT) and managing tasks independently. Are you comfortable with this?
*Do you have reliable internet, power source and a suitable laptop or computer for remote work?
*Do you have experience with building out budgets, forecasts, financial modelling, inventory management tools using Excel or Google Sheets?
*Do you have experience in planning and executing promotional calendars, including Black Friday, Prime Day, and other major sales events.
*Do you have 1+ years of experience managing Amazon Seller Central or Vendor Central accounts (listings, SEO content, catalog, promotions, account health).
